---
id: userland-users-controller-send-email-change
title: "Send email change code"
description: "Sends an email that contains a one-time code used to change a user's email address."

api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send email change code"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/users/{id}/email_change/send"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sends an email that contains a one-time code used to change a user's email address.
